# Loyalty Gold Tier Threshold

Gold tier status currently requires $1,000 or more in purchases within a rolling 12-month window (effective 2026-05-15). Two earlier Source versions (2024-01, 2025-06) described lower thresholds now superseded; only the current version is cited here.

[Source: loyalty_tiers_v3.md#gold-tier-threshold]
